# Damien Herlihy — A Digital Universe (full index)

> Damien Herlihy is an Australian language teacher and learner — TESOL-trained, a former IELTS examiner and EAP teacher, co-founder of TEC (a language school in Trat, Thailand), and creator of Language Layouts. This site is his "digital universe": a digital garden of notes, essays and patterns on language teaching, learning how to learn, AI in education, and personal knowledge management.

## About Damien

Born and raised in Brisbane, Australia. Travelled and fell for South East Asia, did a CELTA in
London, then taught children in Bangkok before getting serious — a Master of Teaching English as a
Second Language, then English-for-Academic-Purposes teaching in Melbourne (wearing many hats:
teacher, coordinator, IELTS examiner, action researcher). Met his wife and together opened TEC, a
language school in Trat, Thailand, which he now helps run remotely. Today he writes here and builds
Language Layouts — Notion templates for teachers and learners who want a system that actually works.

The site is a "digital garden" (after Maggie Appleton), reframed with a space theme: stars (notes),
constellations (patterns), and galaxies (essays), plus a library of book/resource notes.

- Website: https://www.damienherlihy.com/
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@damienherlihy
- Language Layouts: https://www.languagelayouts.com/
- Newsletter (disASTER): https://dis-aster.vercel.app
- School: TEC — https://www.tecschool.org/

## Writing, by theme

### AI & Teaching

- [Centaur ELT: Learning a Language](https://www.damienherlihy.com/post/centaur-elt-learning-a-language) — Star / Note

- [Centaur ELT: Wellbeing](https://www.damienherlihy.com/post/centaur-elt-wellbeing) — Star / Note
- [One Useful Thing (AI): E & L Mollick](https://www.damienherlihy.com/post/one-useful-thing-ai-e-l-mollick) — Library
- [TextFX: Lupe Fiasco](https://www.damienherlihy.com/post/textfx-lupe-fiasco) — Library

### Personal Knowledge Management
- [PKM for Teachers: The State of Play](https://www.damienherlihy.com/post/personal-knowledge-management-for-teachers-the-state-of-play) — Galaxy / Essay

### Languages
